hours: Dinner (typically 5:30 PM - 9:30 PM); Lunch (select sailings, typically 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM)
dress_code: Smart Casual (no swimsuits, tank tops, bare feet)
what_makes_it_unique: It is the only Jamie Oliver branded restaurant at sea, focusing on rustic Italian dishes made with fresh, seasonal ingredients and handmade pasta.
warnings: The exact cover charge can vary slightly by ship and sailing.
Lunch service is not available on all ships or sailings.
